nasb.text: His concubine, whose name was Reumah, also bore Tebah and Gaham and Tahash and Maacah.

esv.text: Moreover, his concubine, whose name was Reumah, bore Tebah, Gaham, Tahash, and Maacah.

cnv.text: 拿鶴的妾名叫流瑪。她也生了提八、迦含、他轄和瑪迦。

ccb.text: 拿鹤的妾流玛生了提八、迦含、他辖和玛迦。

csbs.text: 拿鹤的妾名叫琉玛，她生了特巴、迦含、塔哈斯和玛迦。
